member.name: T:TruckMate.BackgroundServices.DriverOnlineTimeBackgroundService
member.summary: Every minute, increments for online drivers (UTC day bucket).

member.name: T:TruckMate.BackgroundServices.RequestExpiryBackgroundService
member.summary: Marks open marketplace requests past as expired.

member.name: T:TruckMate.BackgroundServices.TraderGdprDataExportHostedService
member.summary: Polls pending GDPR export rows and sends the ready email (ZIP build is a placeholder).

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.AuthController.Logout(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Logs out current user and invalidates active JWT token.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController
member.summary: Driver mobile home & courier trip actions.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController.GetHome(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Aggregates profile, active trip, today stats, and recent deliveries.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController.PatchStatus(TruckMate.Core.DriverHome.Dtos.DriverStatusPatchRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Toggles online/offline availability and notifies dispatchers over SignalR.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController.GetIncomingTrips(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists pending zone-matched courier offers visible while the driver is online.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController.StartTrip(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks an assigned courier trip as in-progress.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController.TripExecution(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns driver trip execution payload for pickup/transit/delivery screens.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController.SyncTrip(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lightweight retry endpoint for connection-loss UI.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController.CompleteTrip(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks an in-progress courier trip as completed and creates earning record.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController.TripDetails(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deep-link friendly payload for assigned trip introspection.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverController.RecentTrips(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Paginated ledger of historical completed courier trips.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverMarketplaceTripsController
member.summary: Driver marketplace: browse open trip requests, accept/reject, and list assigned trips.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverMarketplaceTripsController.GetAvailableRequests(TruckMate.Validation.MarketplaceAvailableRequestsQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Available Requests tab — paginated open requests excluding this driver's rejections.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverMarketplaceTripsController.GetRequestDetail(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Request Details screen — includes trader phone and special notes (not returned on the list endpoint).

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverMarketplaceTripsController.AcceptRequest(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Accept a marketplace request and create an assigned .

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverMarketplaceTripsController.RejectRequest(System.Guid,TruckMate.Core.DriverTrips.Dtos.RejectTripRequestRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reject hides the request from this driver's available list; it stays open for others.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverMarketplaceTripsController.GetMyTrips(TruckMate.Validation.MarketplaceMyTripsQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: My Trips tab — trips assigned to this driver via marketplace or dispatch.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverOffersController.GetCurrent(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the active incoming offer card for the authenticated driver.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverOffersController.Accept(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Accepts a pending trip offer before it expires.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverOffersController.Decline(System.Guid,TruckMate.Core.DriverOffers.Dtos.DeclineOfferRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Declines a pending trip offer and requests redispatch to another driver.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverOffersController.Status(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Polling fallback for clients when SignalR is unavailable.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverSettingsController
member.summary: Driver advanced settings endpoints.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverSettingsController.GetProfile(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Profile ribbon for Advanced Settings header.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverSettingsController.ChangePassword(TruckMate.Core.DriverSettings.Dtos.ChangePasswordRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Changes password and invalidates previous JWT issuance via TokenVersion bumps.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverWalletController
member.summary: Driver wallet endpoints for summary and earning trips.

member.summary: Returns wallet totals, growth, and summary cards.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverWalletController.GetSummary(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns wallet totals, growth, and summary cards.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverWalletController.GetTrips(TruckMate.Core.DriverWallet.Dtos.DriverWalletTripsQueryDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns paginated earning trips with tab filter.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.DriverWalletController.GetTripDetail(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single earning-trip detail owned by authenticated driver.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.LegalDocumentsController.GetDocument(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the active legal document for the requested route key.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController
member.summary: Trader advanced settings endpoints (shipper-facing mobile app).

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.GetProfile(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Trader profile ribbon for Advanced Settings header.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.ChangePassword(TruckMate.Core.DriverSettings.Dtos.ChangePasswordRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Changes password for the Trader account.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.UpdateContact(TruckMate.Core.DriverSettings.Dtos.UpdateContactRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates email and/or phone; verification flows are queued.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.GetNotifications(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns shipment and payment lifecycle notification switches.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.PatchNotifications(TruckMate.Core.TraderSettings.Dtos.TraderNotificationPreferencesPatchDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Upserts Trader notification preference rows.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.GetPrivacy(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns business privacy posture and GDPR timestamps.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.PatchPrivacy(TruckMate.Core.TraderSettings.Dtos.TraderPrivacySettingsPatchDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates privacy toggles with per-field GDPR audit logging.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.RequestDataExport(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests a GDPR data portability export ZIP (queued; email sent when ready).

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.DeleteAccount(TruckMate.Core.DriverSettings.Dtos.ScheduleAccountDeletionRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Schedules Trader account deletion with a grace period unless blocked shipments exist.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Controllers.TraderSettingsController.CancelDeletion(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Cancels a pending Trader account deletion inside the grace window.

member.name: M:TruckMate.API.Controllers.RegisterController.ValidateOtpToken(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: التحقق من الـ OTP Token اللي بيجي مع طلب التسجيل

member.name: M:TruckMate.API.Controllers.RegisterController.ValidateResetToken(System.String)
member.summary: التحقق من الـ Reset Token وإرجاع الـ UserId

member.name: M:TruckMate.API.Services.IEmailService.SendEmailVerificationAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a contact verification message (alias for advanced settings flows).

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.DriverHome.Dtos.DriverStatusPatchRequest.Status
member.summary: Online or Offline.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Core.DriverSettings.FullNameInitials.FromFullName(System.String)
member.summary: First letter of first name + first letter of last name, uppercased.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Core.Enums.CourierTripStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle for courier-facing delivery trips (driver mobile app).

member.name: T:TruckMate.Core.Enums.DriverAvailabilityStatus
member.summary: Driver visibility for accepting new shipments on the driver app.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Core.Enums.TripRequestStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle for marketplace trip requests (driver browses and accepts).

member.name: T:TruckMate.Core.Models.DeliveryTrip
member.summary: Shipment trip shown on the driver home screen (separate from legacy offer-based Trip).

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.DeliveryTrip.AssignedDriverId
member.summary: Nullable until a dispatcher assigns this offer to a driver.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.DeliveryTrip.ShipmentNumericId
member.summary: Display number used to render SHP-####.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.DeliveryTrip.DateUtc
member.summary: Trip calendar date (UTC date part).

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.DeliveryTrip.ScheduledStartTime
member.summary: Optional scheduled slot; actual start tracked in StartedAtUtc.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.DeliveryTrip.Zone
member.summary: District used to match Pending offers with the driver.CurrentZone.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.DeliveryTrip.EarningsOnCompletionEgp
member.summary: Amount credited to driver's daily earnings when Status becomes Completed.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.Driver.PublicId
member.summary: Stable public identifier exposed to mobile clients alongside legacy int FK.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.Driver.AssignedDeliveryTripId
member.summary: Courier trip currently assigned/in progress for this driver (max one).

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.Driver.LastAvailabilityChangeUtc
member.summary: Last transition to Online; used together with Offline transitions for session tracking.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.People.TokenVersion
member.summary: Incremented to invalidate previously issued JWT access tokens.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.People.IsDeleted
member.summary: Account scheduled for hard deletion (driver mobile advanced settings).

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.People.ScheduledHardDeleteAtUtc
member.summary: When the account will be permanently removed if not cancelled.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Core.Models.RequestNumberSequence
member.summary: Singleton row (Id = 1) storing the last assigned REQ-#### number.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.Trader.TokenVersion
member.summary: Separate from People.TokenVersion — used in Trader JWT validation.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.Trader.PhoneNumber
member.summary: Business phone shown on driver request details; falls back to when empty.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.Trader.EmailVerificationOtpHash
member.summary: BCrypt hash of emailed verification OTP for pending email change verification.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.TraderPrivacySetting.GdprDataExportDeliveredAtUtc
member.summary: Set when compile-and-email completes (hosted worker).

member.name: T:TruckMate.Core.Models.TripRequest
member.summary: Open marketplace shipment request visible to eligible online drivers.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.TripRequest.Zone
member.summary: Operational zone; must match for listing.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.TripRequest.RequiredTruckType
member.summary: When set, only drivers whose matches can see the request.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.Models.TripRequest.CreatedDeliveryTripId
member.summary: Delivery trip created when a driver accepts this request.

member.name: P:TruckMate.Core.TraderSettings.Dtos.TraderSettingsProfileResponseDto.BusinessName
member.summary: Optional company trade name for business traders.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Data.Context.TruckMateDbContext.ApplyCourierTripCompletionSideEffects
member.summary: Applies business rule updates when a transitions to Completed (trips count, earnings, clearing assigned-trip pointer).

member.name: M:TruckMate.Data.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.TraderHasBlockingShipmentsAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: True if the trader has shipments that prevent account deletion.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Hubs.DriverHub
member.summary: Real-time courier channel (/hubs/driver).

member.name: F:TruckMate.Hubs.DriverHub.MarketplaceAllDriversGroupName
member.summary: All drivers subscribed on the Trips marketplace tab (expiry fan-out).

member.name: M:TruckMate.Hubs.DriverHub.UpdateStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Driver emits availability changes (mirrors PATCH /api/driver/status).

member.name: M:TruckMate.Hubs.DriverHub.JoinOperationalZone(System.String)
member.summary: Optional: join zone channel for granular TripOffer fan-out.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Hubs.DriverHub.JoinDispatcherFeed
member.summary: Dispatcher dashboards subscribe for DriverAvailabilityChanged and CourierTripStarted events.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Hubs.DriverHub.JoinAvailableRequestsRoom(System.String)
member.summary: Subscribe to marketplace SignalR events for a zone while on Available Requests.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Middleware.TokenVersionValidationMiddleware
member.summary: Ensures JWT token_version matches the database and blocks accounts past their grace window.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Services.Accounts.IAccountHardDeletionExecutor
member.summary: Permanently removes users whose deletion grace periods have elapsed.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Services.DriverHome.ICourierTripDispatchService
member.summary: Used by dispatcher integrations to assign courier trips and raise SignalR payloads.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Services.DriverHome.DriverHomeService
member.summary: Aggregates driver home payloads and coordinates courier-trip transitions.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Services.DriverHome.IDriverRealtimePublisher.PublishDriverAvailabilityChangedAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Notifies the dispatcher dashboard that a driver toggled availability.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Services.DriverHome.IDriverRealtimePublisher.PublishTripAssignedAsync(System.Int32,TruckMate.Services.DriverHome.TripAssignedSignalPayload,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Notifies a specific driver that a trip was assigned.

member.name: M:TruckMate.Services.DriverHome.IDriverRealtimePublisher.PublishTripOfferAsync(System.String,TruckMate.Services.DriverHome.TripOfferSignalPayload,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Announces a new pending trip for drivers in a zone (online clients should filter client-side).

member.name: M:TruckMate.Services.DriverHome.IDriverRealtimePublisher.PublishTripStartedAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dispatcher + monitoring: trip moved to InProgress.

member.name: T:TruckMate.Services.DriverTrips.IMarketplaceRequestCacheBumper
member.summary: Bumps a global version so per-driver available-request cache entries become stale immediately.
